name: Pantoro Limited
description: Pantoro Limited is an Australian-based gold producer and explorer focused on the development and operation of its 100%-owned Norseman Gold Project in Western Australia. The company is dedicated to unlocking the full potential of this historically significant, world-class gold province. Through strategic exploration, resource development, and efficient mining operations, Pantoro aims to deliver sustainable growth and value for its shareholders. The company is listed on the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX: PNR) and maintains its corporate headquarters in West Perth, Western Australia, where it manages its diverse portfolio of gold assets and exploration activities.
